title: HOOK 2 — Ginger digs a hole
prompt: Medium close-up in @backyard-kitchen, locked low camera at ground level. @Ginger crouches in front of a flowerbed of pink and purple petunias center-frame, both front paws scratching rapidly at the dark soil, dirt flying behind. The small golden bagel sits to the side on the grass. Ginger panting happily: "Hff hff hff!" Soft warm sunlight, no humans visible.
